changelog: Auto-Populated Details: When installing the app on a non-licensed machine for the first time, the Activation Window will now automatically populate your Machine ID and required details—no more manual copying and pasting to get started!
We’ve added flexible options to help you send your activation requests instantly using your preferred communication tool:
💬 WhatsApp: Launch the standard WhatsApp Desktop app (whatsapp://) or open WhatsApp Web directly in your default browser.
✉️ Email: Open your local mail client (like Outlook) via mailto:, or jump straight to a pre-composed message screen in Gmail Web or Outlook Web.
📋 Smart Fallback: If you prefer a different method, the app automatically copies your activation details (Email + Machine ID) to your clipboard for quick manual pasting.
Under-the-hood optimizations for a faster, more stable experience.
